title: Department of Architecture Faculty Member Dr. Gürkan Özenen's Book was Published by Springer Publishing House
content:
Department of Architecture Faculty Member Dr. Gürkan Özenen's Book was Published by Springer Publishing House

Perşembe

ISTUN Department of Architecture Faculty Member Dr. Gürkan Özenen's book titled "Architectural Interior Lighting" was published by the international Springer Publishing House.

We congratulate our faculty member and wish him continued success.
